payload.answer: I couldn’t remember the article because the provided URL failed to fetch with a 404/network error. No article content was available, so I did not create any durable memory about its claims.

details: Requested to remember an article for usefulness to memory architecture.

repair_options: Retry fetching the URL later if the error may be temporary.
